creator: yar@shvets.name
text:
(In reply to Yaroslav Shvets from comment #2)

I mean I don’t remember whether vt worked at all on this server. Only sc.

vt does not work on:
FreeBSD 11.2-RELEASE-p3 #0 r338696
FreeBSD 11.3-RELEASE-p3 #0 r352207
FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE-p10 r352411

Now on 12.0-RELEASE-p10 with vt shows at boot only:

Loading kernel...
/boot/kernel/kernel text=0x17f5050 data=0x1f8afc+0x76bd5c syms=0x8+0x19d220+0x8
+0x1c8093]
Loading configured modules...
/boot/entropy size=0x1000
\

And all. Console not respond.

sc worked.
